---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<h2 class="section-title">Get in Touch</h2>

<div class="intro-section">
I am always interested in discussing research opportunities, collaborations, or answering questions about my work. Feel free to reach out!
</div>

### 📄 Curriculum Vitae

<div style="margin: 1rem 0;">
  <a href="files/CV_SiyuChen_v3.pdf" class="cv-button">📄 Download My CV</a>
</div>

### 📧 Email

<div class="contact-links">
  <a href="mailto:csiyu869@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
    <span class="contact-icon">📧</span>
    csiyu869@gmail.com
  </a>
  <a href="mailto:26230324@njnu.edu.cn" class="contact-link">
    <span class="contact-icon">📧</span>
    26230324@njnu.edu.cn
  </a>
</div>

---

<h2 class="section-title">Online Profiles</h2>

### 🎓 Academic Profiles

<div class="contact-links">
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=05zqMBsAAAAJ&hl=en" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">📚</span>
    Google Scholar
  </a>
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0007-3631-9389" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">🆔</span>
    ORCID
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Siyu-Chen-210?ev=hdr_xprf" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">🔬</span>
    ResearchGate
  </a>
</div>

### 💻 Code & Data

<div class="contact-links">
  <a href="https://github.com/SiyuChen1111" class="contact-link" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">🐙</span>
    GitHub
  </a>
</div>

<p class="page-footer"><em>Last updated: March 2026</em></p>
